1.719.1-preview
https://www.nuget.org/packages/Microsoft.Direct3D.D3D12/1.719.1-preview
I renamed the .nupkg to .zip and unzipped it.
I copied the contents of build/native/bin/x64 to bin.
I copied the contents of build/native/include to include.
In the code, D3D12SDKVersion had to be updated to 719 (find "D3D12SDKVersion" in files), which matches the middle 3 digits and can also be seen in the header files in the SDK code. like D3D12_PREVIEW_SDK_VERSION in d3d12.h.
